title: New Construction Project Jobs!
description:
Jobs. Jobs. Jobs. (Mgt / Snr / Executive / Supervisory Post)

New Job Opportunities — Construction & Infrastructure

(Civil/ Structural/ Building/Elect/Mech/MEP/ACMV/M&E)

  • Every application puts you in front of Top Employers.
  • If you don’t apply, they won’t know you exist. Don't hesitate!
  • Send your CV now — seize your next career step and a bigger paycheck.
  • Submit your CV today!
  • Apply now at: https://www.ourrecruiters.com

Eligibility:

Open to Singaporean residents OR

Candidates with experience working in Singapore or Malaysia are encouraged to apply.

We are hiring across multiple projects for LTA, HDB, Changi Airport and private developments.

Competitive pay, career progression, and project exposure across civil, structural, M&E and multidisciplinary teams.


How to apply

Submit CV, current & expected salary, and earliest available start date

State the role(s) you are applying for.

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.


Why Apply? If you don’t apply, they won’t know you exist. Don't hesitate!

Work on high‑profile infrastructure projects: MRT stations, tunnels, roads, airport works, HDB precincts, sewerage and utilities.

Safety‑first culture with full compliance to LTA, HDB, Changi Airport and MOM WSH requirements.

Career development, training and support for local licence applications (PE, BCA CSS where applicable).

Competitive salary, CPF contributions and benefits.


Key requirements according to positions

Relevant degree/diploma/certification for the role.

Proven experience on Singapore or Malaysian projects where stated.

Strong teamwork, communication and commitment to safety and quality.

Available roles (high‑level)

Senior Management & Project Management

Project Director / Senior Project Manager / Project Manager / Assistant Project Manager

Lead project delivery, manage scope, schedule, budget, procurement and stakeholder liaison.

Requirements: Degree in Engineering/Construction Management or related. 10+ years for Director; 5+ years for Senior PM. PMP desirable.

Construction Management & Site Leadership

Construction Manager (Building) / Site Manager / Site Supervisor / Construction Supervisor

Oversee site operations, subcontractors, logistics, quality and safety.

Requirements: Degree/diploma in Civil Engineering or Construction Management. 5+ years for Construction Manager; 1–3+ years for supervisory roles. BCA CSS preferred.

Engineering & Technical

Civil / Structural Engineer (Design & Site)

Design, review and supervise MRT, tunnel, road and residential projects. Produce structural drawings and technical reports.

Requirements: Degree in Civil/Structural Engineering. Singapore PE licence beneficial; experienced candidates without PE considered.

Tunnel / TBM Engineer, Geotechnical Engineer, Piling & Specialist Site Engineers

Design support, monitoring and site supervision for complex groundworks.

M&E Engineer / Senior M&E Engineer / M&E Coordinator

Plan and coordinate M&E installation and commissioning on site.

Requirements: Degree in Mechanical/Electrical Engineering.

Min. 2 years’ experience. Class 3 licence preferred.

Design & BIM

BIM Manager / BIM Engineer / BIM Coordinator / BIM Modeller

Lead BIM delivery, co‑ordination, clash detection and model handover. Proficiency in Revit, Navisworks essential.

  • Every application puts you in front of Top Employers.
  • If you don’t apply, they won’t know you exist.
    Send your CV — make your next move possible.
  • Give your career and salary a real boost — submit your CV today!
  • Apply now at: https://www.ourrecruiters.com

Quantity Surveying & Contracts

Tender Manager / Senior Quantity Surveyor / Quantity Surveyor / Contracts Manager

Cost estimating, tendering, valuations, claims and contract administration.

Requirements: Degree/diploma in Quantity Surveying or related. Familiarity with HDB/LTA frameworks advantageous.

Health, Safety & Environment

Safety Officer / Safety Supervisor / HSE Coordinator / Environmental Officer (ECO)

Implement WSH programmes, risk assessments, toolbox talks and incident investigations.

Requirements: Certificate/diploma in Occupational Safety & Health. MOM WSH experience preferred.

Quality & Testing

QA/QC Engineer / QA Officer / Materials Engineer / Testing Engineer

Implement QA/QC regimes, inspection plans and materials testing.


Planning, Procurement & Commercial Support

Construction Planner / Scheduler / Planning Manager

Procurement Engineer / Procurement Officer / Purchasing Executive

Contract Administrator / Document Controller / Project Coordinator

Project Accountant / Cost Controller

Site‑specific & Junior Roles

Site Engineer (Civil/Structural)

Supervise daily site activities, inspect work, resolve design queries and assist PMs.

Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Civil/Environmental Engineering; min. 3 years’ site supervision (or 2 years sewerage experience). WSQ confined space certificate a plus.

Project Engineer / C&S Engineer / Structural Engineer (2+ years)

Construction Foreman / Site Coordinator

Office & Support

Accountant (full sets reporting for construction firm)

Accounts Executive / Assistant (full or partial sets)

HR Specialist (construction focus)

Contracts Administrator

  • Every application puts you in front of Top Employers.
  • If you don’t apply, they won’t know you exist.
    Send your CV — make your next move possible.
  • Give your career and salary a real boost — submit your CV today!
  • Apply now at: https://www.ourrecruiters.com

Engineering and Construction Job Opportunities

– Over 280 Positions Available with Competitive Pay

Jobs available (In summary)

Senior roles: Project Director, Senior Project Manager, Project Manager, Assistant Project Manager

Engineering: Civil / Structural Engineer, Site Engineer, Tunnel / TBM Engineer, Geotechnical Engineer, M&E Engineer

Site & Supervisory: Construction Manager, Site Manager, Site Supervisor, Construction Foreman

Commercial & Technical: Quantity Surveyor, Tender Manager, Contracts Manager, QA/QC Engineer, Materials Engineer

HSE & Environmental: Safety Officer / Supervisor, HSE Coordinator, Environmental Officer (ECO)

BIM & Design: BIM Manager, BIM Engineer, BIM Modeller

Planning & Procurement: Construction Planner, Procurement Officer

Office & Support: Contract Administrator, Document Controller, Project Accountant, Accountant, HR Specialist, Accounts Executive

Eligibility:

Open to Singaporean residents OR

Candidates with experience working in Singapore or Malaysia are encouraged to apply.

Benefits & employment terms

Competitive salary and bonuses (depending on role and experience).

Medical and insurance coverage, CPF contributions.

Training and certification support (WSH, BCA, PE assistance).

Project allowances for selected site roles.

Remember

  • Every application puts you in front of Top Employers.
  • If you don’t apply, they won’t know you exist.
    Send your CV — make your next move possible.
  • Give your career and salary a real boost — submit your CV today!
  • Apply now at: https://www.ourrecruiters.com

Eligibility:

Open to Singaporean residents OR

Candidates with experience working in Singapore or Malaysia are encouraged to apply.

Thank you for sending your CV — you’ve opened the door to new opportunities.
Every application puts you in front of employers. If you don’t apply, they won’t know you exist.
Send your CV — make your next move possible.
